positive: A whimsical and intricate scene of glowing celestial flora and fauna thriving in a stylized, stylized forest setting. The central subject is a cluster of bioluminescent dreamcatcher-like moths fluttering among towering, stylized fern leaves and moonlit vines. Use a high-contrast, deep navy, sapphire blue, and vibrant emerald green color palette, evoking a feeling of deep magic and mystery. The style should be Neo-Victorian botanical etching combined with modern abstract psychedelic art. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and symmetry, making it highly scalable for a central t-shirt print. Crisp lines, perfect composition, volumetric lighting, fantasy illustration, intricate detail, high resolution.
